name: Aesthetica ~ Ratcherito Ver. ~
custom_css: @import url(https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Figtree:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap);:root{--main-font-family:'Figtree', sans-serif}body,#sheild,#chat,.content_area,.layout_block,#top-bar,#form_shield,#nonQRFormItems,#send_form,#left-nav-panel,#right-nav-panel,.drawer-content,.drawer-header,#select_chat_popup,#dialogue_popup,#character_popup,.popup,.menu-button,#options,#extensionsMenu,.popup .popper-modal,.info_button{background:#fff0;font-family:'Figtree',sans-serif!important}#top-bar{background:rgb(15 15 15 / .8)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(8px)!important;-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(8px)!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / .1)}#form_shield{background:rgb(10 10 10 / .85)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(10px)!important;padding:25px 0 10px 0!important}.character_item,.char_block,.char_item,.drawer-content .interactable{transition:opacity 0.2s ease!important;cursor:pointer!important}.character_item:hover,.char_block:hover,.char_item:hover{transform:none!important;background-color:rgb(255 255 255 / .1)!important}.mes_content_header{color:#ff6188!important}.custom-mes_command{color:#A9DC76!important}.custom-mes_instruction{color:#78DCE8!important}.mes{position:relative;border-radius:18px;background-color:rgb(25 25 25 / .6)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(5px)!important;border:1px solid rgb(255 255 255 / .1);margin-bottom:15px;padding:15px;cursor:text}.mes::before,.recentChat::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-1px;left:-1px;right:-1px;bottom:-1px;border-radius:19px;padding:1.5px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4285f4,#ea4335,#fbbc04,#34a853);background-size:200% 200%;-webkit-mask:linear-gradient(#fff 0 0) content-box,linear-gradient(#fff 0 0);-webkit-mask-composite:xor;mask-composite:exclude;opacity:0;pointer-events:none!important;transition:opacity 0.3s ease}.mes:hover::before,.recentChat:hover::before{opacity:1;animation:gradient-flow 3s linear infinite}.drawer-content,#left-nav-panel,#right-nav-panel,#select_chat_popup,#dialogue_popup,#character_popup,.popup,.extensions_toolbar,#options,#extensionsMenu,.popup .popper-modal,.info_button,.recentChat{background-color:rgb(15 15 15 / .6);backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}dialog.popup.transparent_dialogue_popup>div{background:transparent!important;background-color:#fff0!important;border:none!important;box-shadow:none!important;padding:0!important;margin:0!important}dialog.popup.transparent_dialogue_popup{background:transparent!important;border:none!important}.welcomeRecent .recentChatList .recentChat:hover{border-radius:18px;background-color:rgb(15 15 15 / .4)}#send_textarea{color:#fff!important;cursor:text!important}#send_form{background-color:rgb(10 10 10 / .5)!important}.fa-solid,.interactable,.info_button,.menu_button,.qr-button,.view_details{cursor:pointer!important}.fa-solid:hover,.interactable:hover,.info_button:hover{color:#fff!important;transform:translateY(-1px)!important;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px #4285f4)!important}@keyframes gradient-flow{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}.ch_name{text-transform:none!important;letter-spacing:normal!important;font-weight:700!important}::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:rgb(255 255 255 / .2)}
